meaning: n.[医]溃疡,[植](树的)癌肿病,腐败vi.患溃疡,腐蚀,溃烂vt.使患溃疡,使腐蚀
examples: His dog has a canker in its ear.
Cold sores usually appear on the lip; canker sores affect the inside of the mouth.
A saltwater gargle will take the bite out of a toothache and ease the pain of canker sores and sore throats.
Mr Barter said the trees were under threat from the spread of the chestnut leaf mining moth and chestnut bleeding canker.
This cynicism is the canker in the body of British democracy itself.
